features.title: Phase 2 baseline and docs refresh
features.description: Mark Phase 1 complete, define Phase 2 as Web Collaboration Beta, and refresh documentation so it reflects the current executable verification baseline.
acceptance_criteria: docs/specs/phase1_scope.md states Phase 1 is complete and Phase 2 starts from the completed Web-first baseline.
Documentation names Phase 2 as Web Collaboration Beta.
docs/architecture/test_matrix.md no longer claims the repository has no executable test entry.
docs/architecture/test_matrix.md includes pnpm typecheck, lint, test, build, format:check, and check commands.
docs/specs/interface_spec.md states Phase 2 implements /api/v1 through Next.js route handlers using shared response, auth, authorization, state machine, audit, and realtime boundaries.
No application source code, test code, database migration, UI, or CI behavior is changed.
Verification evidence is recorded in .harness/changes/20260619-phase2-baseline-docs/testing/results.md during the testing phase.
test_needs: RED-style stale documentation search before edits
GREEN-style stale documentation search after edits
definition_of_done: Required documentation verification passes or has documented exceptions
No unresolved blocking review finding remains
handoff.md updated if the session is interrupted or delivered
